item.title: More than 180 survivors engaged in Harrods abuse redress scheme
item.description: The late Mohamed Al Fayed has been accused of sexual harassment during his time as owner.

item.title: Woman who murdered, cut up and buried partner jailed
item.description: Anna Podedworna is sentenced to life in prison after being convicted of murdering Izabela Zablocka.

item.title: Boy, 13, questioned over double school stabbing
item.description: The investigation into the attack at a London school is being led by counter-terrorism officers.

item.title: Listen to emergency call of Australian boy who swam for hours to save family
item.description: Austin Appelbee, 13, swam to get help for his mother and siblings after they were swept out to sea.

item.title: 'Hard to forgive' love cheat biathlete, says ex-girlfriend
item.description: Norwegian medal-winning biathlete Sturla Holm Laegreid apologises again for cheating on his ex-girlfriend.
